name: derrickorama
tagline: Splish-splashing in the mind of a web dev
body:
# Just a little bit of techie stuff, by derrickorama

Let's be honest, I rarely write posts. Every now and then I feel the need to write something down... every once in a _great_ while.

Pro Tip: If you're not going to be constantly maintaining your WordPress site, stop using WordPress and use something more like Jekyll. I had a site with a bunch of content, but I don't spend much time on it and Webfaction keeps taking it down (WordPress). Switched to Jekyll, so I'm not worried about it anymore.

*Update on my Pro Tip: I host short-term apps with Digital Ocean (they are AMAZE-ing') and recently (as of late 2015) moved this site off of that to a free host.

## Current Stack of Choice

Not that my opinion matters, but this is my currently preferred stack:

* [Node.js](http://nodejs.org) + [Express](http://expressjs.com)
* [React](http://facebook.github.io/react/) + \<insert [flux](https://facebook.github.io/flux/docs/overview.html) framework, haven't decided\>
* [Sass](http://sass-lang.com)
* [Gulp](http://gulpjs.com)
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
